name: update_automation
description: Update a Cursor Automation product entry with the current user's authenticated Cursor session. Use only when the user explicitly asks for Cursor Automations. Non-workflow fields can be patched independently. Workflow updates require a complete replacement workflow plus replaceWorkflow: true after the user reviewed the full replacement. Saving shows a compact payload check generated from the serialized request.

automationId.description: Automation ID (UUID) of the Cursor Automation to update.

name.description: Optional new display name for the Cursor Automation.

description.description: Optional new description shown in the Cursor Automations UI.

workflow.description: Optional complete replacement workflow in UpdateAutomationRequest proto JSON form. This replaces the entire stored workflow; set replaceWorkflow to true only after the user reviewed the complete replacement.

replaceWorkflow.description: Must be true when workflow is provided, acknowledging that workflow replaces the entire stored workflow instead of patching it.

enabled.description: Optional enabled state for the automation.
